title: Claude Code agents: we built one in 125 lines
meta_description: Cut daily automation time from 30 minutes to 3 minutes with a 125-line Claude Code agent — no Docker, no Lambda, no yak shaving. Practical walkthrough with code, benchmarks, and lessons learned.
prewritten_tweet:

The fix? A 125-line Claude agent that inherits the host runtime.
